title: FxLib
description:
All mod prerequisite dependency libraries of dyed_fanxing, FxLib, personal mod dependency library.

dyed_fanxing的所有mod前置依赖库，个人mod依赖库。
body:
dyed_fanxing's prerequisite dependency library for all mods — FxLib, a personal mod dependency library. It provides a series of basic functionalities needed for mod development, including: data components, attributes, entity attachments, network packets, configuration, rendering components, collision detection, and more.

dyed_fanxing的所有Mod前置依赖库 —— FxLib，这是一个 个人 Mod 依赖库。它提供了开发 Mod 所需的一系列基础功能，包括：数据组件、属性、实体附件、网络包、配置、渲染组件、碰撞检测等等。
